items.claim: Tabitha Ricci's durability has been generally reliable outside of one specific knockout loss.
items.quote: besides that one time we've seen Tabitha Reichi knocked out. Her durability has been pretty damn good.

items.claim: Tabitha Ricci has demonstrated the ability to compete in striking exchanges against high-level opponents.
items.quote: She's hung in the striking with the Yanjaan.

items.claim: Tabitha Ricci has demonstrated the ability to compete in grappling exchanges against high-level opponents.
items.quote: We've seen her hang in the grappling with the verna roba.

items.claim: Tabitha Ricci's cardio is consistently reliable, even when taking fights on short notice.
items.quote: her cardio has always been solid. We don't have to really worry about the cardio.

items.claim: Chase Hooper has a history of losing fights via first-round knockout.
items.quote: I've seen Chase Hooper knocked out multiple times at this point. We all have. And when he's losing his fights, it's not in pretty fashion. It's an early violence.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan has shown a tendency to avoid pursuing finishes even when the opportunity is available.
items.quote: It seemed like he was actively avoiding the knockout.

items.claim: Dricus du Plessis is a natural middleweight currently in his physical prime.
items.quote: he is the natural 185 in his physical prime.

items.claim: Dricus du Plessis's takedown defense was a significant weakness in his previous performance.
items.quote: His takedown defense was a problem in his last fight
